title: Omar says her State of the Union guest was arrested for standing during Trump’s speech
author: Sarah Davis
fullText: Rep. Ilhan Omar (D-Minn.) said her guest for the State of the Union was arrested by U.S. Capitol Police on “Unlawful Conduct” charges on Tuesday evening for standing during President Trump’s address.  In a post on the social media platform X, Omar said her constituent Aliya Rahman was “forcibly removed” from the House chamber after…
summary: Rep.
